_source: Calibrated against Numbeo (numbeo.com/cost-of-living), Livingcost.org, and World Bank GDP PPP data. April 2026. rentMajorCity = 1BR in top nomad-hub cities, rentSmallerCity = 1BR national average outside major metros. All values USD/month for a single digital nomad. rent2br/rent3br = 2-bedroom/3-bedroom single national averages derived from Numbeo bedroom-ratio data.
_methodology: Primary: Numbeo city-level data cross-referenced with Livingcost.org country averages. Secondary: GDP PPP ratio scaling for countries without direct Numbeo coverage. utilities = electricity + water + heating + garbage + internet (Numbeo 85m2 benchmark). dining = ~12 meals/month at inexpensive-to-midrange restaurants. coworking = monthly hot desk. healthInsurance = basic private/travel insurance for nomads.
